title: Tennis player wins gold after years of hard work
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A Park Primary School...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A Park Primary School learner won gold at a holiday tennis clinic and mini tournament held in Mossel Bay during the Easter school holiday.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A Park Primary School learner won gold at a holiday tennis clinic and mini tournament held in Mossel Bay during the Easter school holiday."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Every school holiday, local tennis coach Katie Müller holds this clinic and mini tournament.This year there were tennis players from Mossel Bay and surrounds, from Oudtshoorn and from the Cape at the clinic. Children holidaying in Mossel Bay take part.","html":"Every school holiday, local tennis coach Katie Müller holds this clinic and mini tournament.
This year there were tennis players from Mossel Bay and surrounds, from Oudtshoorn and from the Cape at the clinic. Children holidaying in Mossel Bay take part."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Park Primary School","html":"Park Primary School"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Nevaeh Fransman, in Grade 7 at Park Primary School, won gold.","html":"Nevaeh Fransman, in Grade 7 at Park Primary School, won gold."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A Cape Town boy, Christiaan Fourie, won the boys' section of the competition.","html":"A Cape Town boy, Christiaan Fourie, won the boys' section of the competition."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The tennis clinic and competition took place on 25 and 26 March at the Mossel Bay Tennis Club courts at Harry Giddey Park in the town centre.","html":"The tennis clinic and competition took place on 25 and 26 March at the Mossel Bay Tennis Club courts at Harry Giddey Park in the town centre."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Müller and her two daughters, Margaretha Swanepoel and Katie van Niekerk, are all South African Tennis Association (SATA) Level 4 professional coaches.","html":"Müller and her two daughters, Margaretha Swanepoel and Katie van Niekerk, are all South African Tennis Association (SATA) Level 4 professional coaches."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Müller's daughters assist her with coaching each time the clinic and competition are held.","html":"Müller's daughters assist her with coaching each time the clinic and competition are held."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Three to 16 years"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Children aged three to 16 years take part.","html":"Children aged three to 16 years take part."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The clinic and contest will take place again in June, September and then January next year.They usually take place on a Monday and Tuesday because adults use the tennis courts on a Wednesday.","html":"The clinic and contest will take place again in June, September and then January next year.
They usually take place on a Monday and Tuesday because adults use the tennis courts on a Wednesday."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Müller usually coaches Nevaeh every Monday.","html":"Müller usually coaches Nevaeh every Monday."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Number three"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She is the number three player in Park Primary School's girls' first tennis team.Müller said Nevaeh had reaped the reward of her hard work. \"She has tried for many years to win gold.\"","html":"She is the number three player in Park Primary School's girls' first tennis team.
Müller said Nevaeh had reaped the reward of her hard work. \"She has tried for many years to win gold.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She said the clinic was \"a lot like the Boland practice camps. They hit a lot of balls.\"The children play in a singles and doubles mini tournament. Müller said the experience helped the children take their tennis \"to a higher level\".","html":"She said the clinic was \"a lot like the Boland practice camps. They hit a lot of balls.\"
The children play in a singles and doubles mini tournament. Müller said the experience helped the children take their tennis \"to a higher level\"."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The children who took part in the clinic and mini tournament.","html":"The children who took part in the clinic and mini tournament."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news.","html":"We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news."}]
